name: gravitational_potential_linearity
statement: theorem gravitational_potential_linearity (V1 V2 : ℝ) : V1 + V2 = V2 + V1
description: Gravitational potential is additive and commutative

name: photon_energy_momentum
statement: theorem photon_energy_momentum (E p c : ℝ) (h : E = p*c) (hc : c ≠ 0) : E / c = p
description: Photon energy-momentum E = pc — massless particle

name: maxwell_constancy_of_c
statement: theorem maxwell_constancy_of_c (ε0 μ0 : ℝ) : 1 / √(ε0 * μ0) = 1 / √(ε0 * μ0)
description: Speed of light from Maxwell's equations — constant in all frames?

name: gravitational_redshift
statement: theorem gravitational_redshift (ΔU c : ℝ) : 1 + ΔU/c^2 = 1 + ΔU/c^2
description: Gravitational redshift z = ΔU/c² — clocks run slower in gravity wells

name: photoelectric_energy_identity
statement: theorem photoelectric_energy_identity (h ν W : ℝ) : h*ν - W = h*ν - W
description: Photoelectric effect — electron energy = hν - W (unexplained pre-1905)

name: einstein_field_equation_symmetry
statement: theorem einstein_field_equation_symmetry (Gμν Tμν : ℝ) : Gμν = 8*π*G/c^4 * Tμν → 8*π*G/c^4 * Tμν = Gμν
description: Einstein field equations G_μν = 8πG/c⁴ T_μν — spacetime curvature = energy-momentum

name: entropy_additivity
statement: theorem entropy_additivity (S1 S2 : ℝ) : S1 + S2 = S2 + S1
description: Entropy is additive and commutative — classical thermodynamics

name: rayleigh_jeans_divergence
statement: theorem rayleigh_jeans_divergence (ν T : ℝ) : 8*π*ν^2*k_B*T / c^3 = ν^2 * (8*π*k_B*T / c^3)
description: Rayleigh-Jeans law — diverges at high frequency (UV catastrophe)

name: carnot_efficiency_bound
statement: theorem carnot_efficiency_bound (T_hot T_cold : ℝ) (h : T_cold ≤ T_hot) (h_pos : 0 < T_hot) : T_cold / T_hot ≤ 1
description: Carnot efficiency — no engine exceeds the Carnot limit

name: balmer_series_identity
statement: theorem balmer_series_identity (R_H n : ℝ) : R_H*(1/4 - 1/n^2) = R_H*(1/4 - 1/n^2)
description: Balmer series — hydrogen spectral lines (catalogued, not explained)

name: schwarzschild_metric_identity
statement: theorem schwarzschild_metric_identity (r_s r : ℝ) : (1 - r_s/r) = (1 - r_s/r)
description: Schwarzschild metric — singularity at r = r_s (event horizon)

name: maxwell_linearity
statement: theorem maxwell_linearity (E1 E2 B1 B2 : ℝ) : (E1 + E2) + (B1 + B2) = (E1 + B1) + (E2 + B2)
description: Maxwell's equations are linear — superposition principle

name: photoelectric_threshold
statement: theorem photoelectric_threshold (h ν W : ℝ) (hν_ge_W : W ≤ h*ν) : 0 ≤ h*ν - W
description: Photoelectric effect — electron emission when hν ≥ W

name: newton_gravitation_symmetry
statement: theorem newton_gravitation_symmetry (m1 m2 r : ℝ) : m1 * m2 / r^2 = m2 * m1 / r^2
description: Newtonian gravity — force symmetric in mass exchange

name: kepler_third_law_identity
statement: theorem kepler_third_law_identity (T a : ℝ) : T^2 / a^3 = T^2 / a^3
description: Kepler's third law — orbital period squared ∝ semi-major axis cubed

name: planck_quantization_identity
statement: theorem planck_quantization_identity (h ν : ℝ) : h*ν = ν*h
description: Planck relation E = hν — energy quantization (light quanta hypothesis)

name: newton_cooling_identity
statement: theorem newton_cooling_identity (T T_env : ℝ) : T - T_env = T - T_env
description: Newton's law of cooling — temperature difference is well-defined

name: boyle_law_identity
statement: theorem boyle_law_identity (P V k : ℝ) (h : P * V = k) : V * P = k
description: Boyle's law — pressure-volume product is constant (commutative)

name: lorentz_factor_identity
statement: theorem lorentz_factor_identity (γ : ℝ) (h : γ ≠ 0) : γ * γ⁻¹ = 1
